title: Compute P95 Latency
description: Given a list of latency values (one per line), compute the 95th percentile latency using the nearest-rank method. The nearest-rank index is ceil(0.95 * n) - 1 (0-indexed) after sorting ascending. Return the latency value as an integer.
constraints: Latency values are positive integers, one per line
Use nearest-rank method: sort ascending, index = ceil(0.95 * n) - 1
Return the integer value at that index
Input will always have at least one value

test_cases.description: 10 latency values, P95 is the highest value
Single value, P95 is that value
